'''Bullba Bari''' was a [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] who founded [[BullbaBong]], a successful manufacturer and seller of [[bongo]]s. He was the [[Parent/Legends|father]] of [[Toba]] and the [[Marriage/Legends|husband]] of [[Neesada Bari]].

{{Char-stub}}
